name: Romertopf Beef in Red Wine
recipeIngredient: 3 lbs beef chuck, cut into 1-inch cubes
1 can (1 lb) tomatoes, chopped with liquid
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except tomatoes in a large bowl.
2. Refrigerate covered for 2-3 hours.
3. Soak the top and bottom of a 3 1/4 quart (3.25 L) clay cooker in cold water for about 15 minutes, then drain.
4. Transfer the beef mixture to the cooker. Add the chopped tomatoes with their liquid.
5. Place the covered cooker in the cold oven. Set the oven temperature to 425°F/220°C.
6. Bake, stirring once or twice, until the beef and carrots are tender, about 2 1/2 to 3 hours.
